obligations.notes: Compiled from workflow-state canonical design artifacts.
obligations.observable_oracle: После нажатия `Очистить` изменённое состояние фильтров совпадает с зафиксированным initial state.
obligations.test_intent: Capture initial filter state, choose one visible filter value, then click `Очистить`.

obligations.test_intent: Capture initial sort state, click one sortable header until state changes, then click `Очистить`.

obligations.test_intent: Capture initial page, navigate to `page 2`, then click `Очистить`.
